confidence.label: moderate
confidence.rationale: Maximum collective-immortality score is directly supported by Mao's canonical texts coding death-for-the-people as the supreme human meaning. Confidence capped at moderate pending chain expansion and periodization review.

reviewNote: Score value 5/5 defensible: collective-immortality mechanism (revolutionary martyrdom, continuous revolution doctrine) supports maximum score. Confidence 0.67 reflects chain-requires-expansion and periodization ambiguity (which phase of Maoism?). Hold at score-review until chain expansion and periodization is specified.
